name: Super Quantum Blue Layer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>量</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ブルーレイヤー
desc: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Super Quant" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Super Quantum Blue Layer". If this card is sent to the GY: You can target up to 3 "Super Quant" cards in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Super Quantum Blue Layer" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Super Quant" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Super Quantum Blue Layer". If this card is sent to the GY: You can target up to 3 "Super Quant" cards in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Super Quantum Blue Layer" once per turn.
eff: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Super Quant" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Super Quantum Blue Layer". If this card is sent to the GY: You can target up to 3 "Super Quant" cards in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Super Quantum Blue Layer" once per turn.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
